subcodes.title: Conversation with Dr Finkelstein, Abu Sinan, 1915-03-01
subcodes.first_line: In the loudest voice, I cried out in all the synagogues, and churches: O people! The world of humanity is in peril
subcodes.first_line_orig: من در جمیع کنائس و مجامع بصوت بلند فریاد میزدم که ای قوم عالم انسانی در خطر است
subcodes.subjects: @nationalism; love of country, @unity in diversity, @war and peace, @universal peace; world unity, @harmony of science and religion, @equality of men and women, @unity; oneness of humanity
